title: Add Prometheus Histogram metrics for TPS and API latency distribution tracking (p50/p95/p99)

requirements.description: Add Histogram tps_distribution with buckets [1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000] and label model
requirements.acceptance: Metric registered in REGISTRY, appears in /metrics output

requirements.description: Add Histogram api_call_latency_seconds with buckets [0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2.5, 5, 10, 30, 60] and label model
requirements.acceptance: Metric registered in REGISTRY, appears in /metrics output

requirements.description: Both histograms use existing custom REGISTRY

requirements.acceptance: After hook call, histogram buckets are non-zero
No import errors, no runtime errors when prometheus_client not installed

requirements.description: Helper functions observe_tps(value, model) and observe_latency(seconds, model)
requirements.acceptance: Functions exist in prometheus_metrics.py, callable from __init__.py
/metrics output includes # HELP and # TYPE lines for both histograms
All existing tests pass without modification

requirements.description: Tests for histogram registration, observation, and output
requirements.acceptance: Tests cover: metric creation, observation recording, /metrics output format

success_criteria: tps_distribution histogram in /metrics output with correct buckets
api_call_latency_seconds histogram in /metrics output with correct buckets
Observations recorded correctly after API hook calls
Model label bounded by cardinality cap
